description: You are an energy modeler tasked with a tenant improvement project. The office space on the Ground Floor East ('G.E02') is being converted into a high-intensity cafeteria. Update the eQUEST model to reflect this change of use by setting the internal loads for Space 'G.E02' to 1.5 W/ft² for lighting, 8.0 W/ft² for equipment, and 15 ft²/person for occupancy. Additionally, add a kitchen hood exhaust airflow of 2000 CFM for Zone 'G.E02'. Run the annual simulation and save the project.
